rulings.Case Title: PAUL M VAN SYCKEL VS. DJJ'S A LUCKY DOG LLC DBA 'A LUCKY DOG' et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Striking Untimely Amended X-Comp And Dismissing X-Action For Failure To Amend X-Comp After Demurrer Was Sustained With Leave To Amend And Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 27, 2007, LINE 11. PLAINTIFF PAUL SYCKEL'S MOTION For Order Striking Untimely Amended CROSS-COMPLAINT And Dismissing CROSS Action For Failure To Amend CROSS-COMPLAINT After Demurrer Was Sustained With Leave To Amend And, Request For Judicial Notice: MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED. AT A MINIMUM, THE GOLDEN DECLARATION PROVIDES A BASIS FOR A FINDING OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. THE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED FOR THE SAME REASON BUT THE COURT CAUTIONS DEFENSE COUNSEL TO CORRECTLY CITE THE LAW IN HIS DEALINGS WITH PLAINTIFF. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: HARTFORD LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA EX.REL. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Plaintiffs Hartford Life Insurance Company And Hartford Life And Accident Insurance Company'S Motion For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 27, 2007, LINE 23. PLAINTIFF HARTFORD LIFE INSURANCE CO. AND HARTFORD LIFE AND ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DENIED. 1.) THE ABATIE DECISION DOES NOT CHANGE THE COURT'S DECISION. 2.) DEFENDANT'S ORDER WAS NOT AN UNDERGROUND REGULATION; IT ONLY APPLIED TO PLAINTIFF. 3.) THIS CASE INVOLVED ONLY LEGAL ISSUES. 4.) THE DEFINITION OF "REGULATION" IS UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; THE DEFINITION OF "STATE LAW" IS UNDER ERISA. 5.) THE COURT DID NOT MAKE FACTUAL FINDINGS. 6.) THE COURT PROPERLY REJECTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. 7.) AS A MATTER OF LAW, DEFENDANT WAS OBLIGATED TO WITHDRAW THE ENTIRE POLICY UNDER INSURANCE CODE SECTION 10291.5. 8.) THE REFERENCE TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1654 WAS NOT ERRONEOUS. =(302/PJM/PB)
